overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a dark coat exploring a foggy, snow-dusted goblin mine entrance at night. The character walks along a muddy path past industrial stone and metal structures, entering a tunnel that opens into a vast underground cavern with a large spiral staircase visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty mountain path with stone walls and lantern posts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the misty path toward the mine entrance, passing lantern posts on the left

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff wall forming the left boundary of the path
red rectangular sign mounted on the stone wall
wooden post with glowing yellow lantern providing dim illumination
snow-dusted rocky terrain rising on the right side
scattered snow covering the muddy ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow misty path bordered by stone walls and rocky ledges. Lantern posts provide sparse yellow illumination in the foggy darkness, with patches of snow visible on the muddy ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial mine entrance with large metal wheels

events.description: location text 'Coastal Caverns Goblin Mine' appears on screen identifying the area

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past large industrial machinery toward the tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: goblin worker sitting idle by the grassy ledge near the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: massive rusted metal wheel structure with spokes embedded in the hillside
large arched tunnel opening with metal support beams

segments.scene_description: The path approaches the mine entrance where massive industrial metal wheels stand on the right. A goblin worker sits idle near the tunnel mouth as the location name appears on screen, and the stone walls draw closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground tunnel with metal ring supports

events.description: enters the tunnel passing through large metal support rings into the enclosed passage

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark tunnel with metal reinforced walls, approaching the cavern beyond

entered.detail: large circular metal rings lining the tunnel interior
red brick masonry visible on the right side of the tunnel
rusted iron support rings reinforcing the tunnel structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters the tunnel, leaving the outdoor elements behind. The passage is lined with large metal support rings and brick walls, growing darker as it leads deeper underground toward a distant light.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast underground cavern with spiral staircase structure

events.description: emerges from tunnel into large open cavern with massive spiral staircase structure visible

agents.ego_description: approaching the cavern interior with a large spiral structure visible ahead, navigating around wooden barricades

entered.detail: massive stone spiral staircase rising in the distance with glowing accents
broken wooden fence blocking part of the path
rough stone walls of the underground cavern

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens into a vast underground cavern. A massive spiral staircase structure dominates the right side in the distance, while wooden barricades and debris litter the path ahead in the dimly lit space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty, snow-dusted outdoor path into the depths of a massive underground cavern. It begins by tracking a character along a narrow trail bordered by stone walls and sparse yellow lantern light, where patches of snow cling to the muddy ground. As the path approaches the mine entrance, the environment shifts toward industrial machinery with massive metal wheels and a goblin worker stationed near the tunnel mouth. The camera then follows the character into the tunnel, transitioning from the open air to a dark passage lined with brick walls and metal support rings. Finally, the tunnel opens wide to reveal a vast, dimly lit cavern filled with wooden barricades and debris, dominated by a massive spiral staircase structure in the distance.
